Memory — Donation

Add and refine donation-side swipe memory for SacredStatics.

HomeProduct

Seed Donation Memory

Preload donation-focused hooks, impact angles, donor psychology, matching gift urgency, recurring giving, and style systems.

Create Swipe Category



Existing Categories

  • Platform Notes — Platform behavior for donation offers
  • Recurring Giving — Monthly giving and sustainer messaging
  • Trust & Proof — Credibility, transparency, and proof devices
  • Story Formats — Narrative and testimonial structures
  • Donor Psychology — Emotional triggers and donor motivations
  • Urgency & Matching — Deadlines, matches, and urgent asks
  • Impact Angles — Ways to frame the impact of giving
  • Donation Hooks — Donation-specific hooks and lead-ins
